parsed_review.summary: CP00-268 is a clean descriptor-only governance pack (risk B, 40 units, RP07.P09.M03.S11-RP07.P09.M05.S08) consistent with the established CP235-CP267 pattern. Independent read-only inspection confirms the pack-level claim is appropriately bounded: command-evidence reports production_ready:false (descriptor verified, production_ready_candidate pending human final closeout), and the descriptor/attestation set every runtime, write, audit, object-storage, and hermes-runtime-receipt flag to false with no_real_data:true. Pack identity, unit count, deliverable/micro distributions, and section rows agree across the registry binding (registry.js:595), the plan pack (closeout-pack-plan.json:412), the contract projection (search-core-contract.json:16), and the coverage validator (validators.js:7022). Authority boundaries hold: Claude remains a read-only reviewer (allowed tools Read/Grep/Glob, read_only:true) and is not final approver (claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, human_final_approval_required_for_runtime_opening:true), enforced by validators.js:7096-7119. CP178+ review hardening is present: forbidden_review_evidence (registry.js:778) rejects auth failure, zero-byte stdout, malformed JSON, fenced JSON, tool-call-shaped output, missing raw-output/inspection basis, and final-approval/enterprise-trust claims, mirrored in the contract claude_packet; the readiness auth-preflight passed with valid JSON. Hermes patterns are confined to a deterministic descriptor_only_search_review_slice_no_write review packet/receipt, not product runtime. Tests (model.test.js:2131-2178) and the contract validator (validate-rp07-search-core-contract.mjs) cross-check code, contract, and plan, and all gate commands are recorded exit 0. No P0/P1/P2 issues; one P3 informational note about index.js being listed as a ref though unmodified (benign via wildcard re-export).

findings.title: index.js listed as active implementation ref but not in this pack's dirty file set
findings.details: changed-file-scope.json lists packages/search/src/index.js in active_pack_implementation_refs, but index.js does not appear in git_status_rows (it was not modified by CP00-268). This is not a defect: index.js re-exports the entire package surface via `export * from "./service.js"` and `export * from "./validators.js"` (index.js:1-3), so the new CP268 exports (createSearchCoreCp268ReviewSliceDescriptor, ...CaseSet, validateSearchCoreCp268Coverage, ...ReviewSliceDescriptor, ...HermesEvidencePacket, ...ClaudeReviewPacket, ...CloseoutHandoff) are reachable without any change to index.js. The descriptor's index_export_check:true claim is therefore satisfied. Reachability was independently confirmed by grepping the export definitions in service.js (4502, 4535) and validators.js (7136, 7157, 7180).
findings.recommendation: No action required for closeout. Optionally, future scope manifests could distinguish 'export-surface refs' from 'modified-in-pack refs' to avoid the appearance of a missing diff, but the current listing is accurate and the export-surface claim verifies clean.
findings.post_review_disposition: Informational only; verified benign during review. Does not block pack or goal closeout.
